name: HR sabbatical leave policy example
answer:
Employees with five years of service may request an unpaid sabbatical of up to 12 weeks.
Sabbatical requests must be submitted at least 30 days before the leave begins.
The company pays the employee's salary during sabbatical leave.

sources.title: HR Sabbatical Leave Policy
sources.content: Employees with five years of service may request an unpaid sabbatical of up to 12 weeks. Sabbatical requests must be submitted at least 60 days before the leave begins. Sabbatical leave is unpaid.
